result.stdout:
Usage: Conjure.EFX.DotNetTool [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  list          list all the detected Profiles
  refresh       refresh the local cache of the Profile's data model from the
                target DB
  generate      generate code from a Profile's options and resolved templates
  profile       show the resolved details and attributes of a Profile

Run 'Conjure.EFX.DotNetTool [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: Conjure.EFX.DotNetTool [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  list          list all the detected Profiles
  refresh       refresh the local cache of the Profile's data model from the
                target DB
  generate      generate code from a Profile's options and resolved templates
  profile       show the resolved details and attributes of a Profile

Run 'Conjure.EFX.DotNetTool [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
generate code from a Profile's options and resolved templates

Usage: Conjure.EFX.DotNetTool generate [options] <Profile>

Arguments:
  Profile                 name of the profile for which to generate code

Options:
  -p|--project <PROJECT>  the base directory in which to search for profile
                          sub-directories; defaults to the current folder
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
